title: pachypleurum simplex
intro: Pachypleurum simplex, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is commonly known as the 'Dahurian angelica'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pachypleurum simplex include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and improve respiratory function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
